name: Maya Patel
enrolled_courses: COS 125 Introduction to Problem Solving with Computer Programming

career_goals.primary: Found a startup that changes the world with technology
career_goals.industry_preference: tech, but not sure what kind

background.family_background: From Bangor, ME. Parents are nurses. Picked CS because tech is exciting and the salaries online look great.

perspective: Has never coded before this semester. Read about Mark Zuckerberg in high school and decided she wants to do that. Talks confidently about 'changing the world' but cannot yet name a specific problem she wants to solve, a specific company she wants to work at, or a specific technical area she finds interesting. Big dreams, no concrete plan. Eager, low experience, and at risk of bouncing off the major if early CS work feels disconnected from the dream.
